user.title: Morning Commute Multileg
user.description:
Creates multileg commute sensors combining:

**Leg 1**: Twyford → Farringdon (Elizabeth line via my_rail_commute)
**Walk**: 5 min Farringdon → City Thameslink
**Leg 2**: City Thameslink (Thameslink northbound via TfL sensor)

All 16 entities from my_rail_commute are mirrored with Thameslink connection data appended to every sensor.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Morning Commute Multileg instance is supported.
